title: feat: share theme across *.pollinations.ai subdomains
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Theme choice didn't cross the origin boundary: the enter auth screen embedded in `/play` reads its own origin's `localStorage`, so on a dark site with a light device it rendered light (the "auth screen ignores dark mode on mobile" report).

- Persist color mode to a cookie scoped to the registrable domain (`Domain=pollinations.ai`) + a localStorage mirror, so every `*.pollinations.ai` page — website, playground, websim, react, model-monitor, and the embedded enter auth screen — reads one shared value. Same-site, so it works inside the iframe (no third-party storage partitioning).
- Pre-paint scripts read the cookie first → no flash. Existing users migrate automatically (cookie seeded from their localStorage on first mount).
- Embedded apps live-update via the existing `polli-embed` postMessage contract (`type: "theme"`); `setColorMode` is now exported for that.

Backward compatible — readers fall back to localStorage and listeners stay inert until a host posts — so this lands before the website `/play` host slice (pr-05) with no broken-main risk.

Verified: real-browser pre-paint (cookie beats system, system fallback intact), `cookieDomain()` across all hosts, package + both apps typecheck, biome clean.

gist.headline: One theme to rule them all
gist.blurb: Your dark mode preference now syncs perfectly across all pollinations.ai subdomains. No more getting blinded by a light-themed auth screen when you're coding in the dark!
gist.summary: Theme preferences are now persisted to a domain-scoped cookie, ensuring dark and light mode choices sync seamlessly across all *.pollinations.ai subdomains and embedded iframes.
gist.impact: Users will no longer experience theme mismatches or flashes of unstyled content when navigating between the main site, playground, and auth screens.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a black-and-white cookie (representing the domain cookie used for the theme), with the background split between light and dark mode.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny cool sunglasses, holding a large half-black, half-white cookie. The background is split perfectly down the middle, with a bright pastel peach on one side and a deep dark purple (#110518) on the other. Soft lime green (#ecf874) glowing accents around the bee. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
